name: activity-tracker
description: Live flow-graph viewer for Claude Code. KORTEX animates each prompt as a thread that branches into tools and parallel subagents in real time — with zero-config token, cost, and context-window tracking read straight from the session transcript. Local-only, zero dependencies. After installing, restart Claude Code, then open http://127.0.0.1:39000/flow.html to watch.

endpoint.title: Viewer endpoint
endpoint.description: HTTP URL the tracker POSTs each hook event to. Must match the port the viewer server listens on.
